title: SDD Catalog
description: Declares the catalog types managed in this project (.sdd/catalog.json).

types.description: Catalog types to maintain. Each type maps to a docs/design/<id>/ directory.

label.description: Human-readable heading for index.md (e.g. '画面一覧').

id_prefix.description: Prefix for entry IDs (e.g. 'SCR', 'API', 'TBL'). Used as <id_prefix>-NNN.
